creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: swills
Date: Sat Aug 15 22:27:54 UTC 2020
New revision: 545075
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/545075

Log:
  sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match: create port

  Matches a Proc::ProcessTable::Process against a stack of checks.

  This can include cmndline, command fname, EGID, and more.

  WWW: https://metacpan.org/release/Proc-ProcessTable-Match

  PR:		243898
  Submitted by:	Zane C. Bowers-Hadley <vvelox@vvelox.net>

Changes:

  head/sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match/
  head/sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match/Makefile
  head/sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match/distinfo
  head/sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match/pkg-descr
  head/sysutils/p5-Proc-ProcessTable-Match/pkg-plist
